title: From Herzogenaurach to the World
excerpt: How PUMA evolved from a small German sports brand into a global icon of sport and street culture.
content:
[{"id":"section-1772010882617","type":"text","content":"PUMA was founded in Herzogenaurach, Germany, and grew from a small athletic footwear company into one of the most recognized sports brands worldwide."},{"id":"section-1772010891532","type":"quote","content":""Forever Faster is not just a slogan — it is a mindset embedded in our DNA."","caption":"John Smith"},{"id":"section-1772010912082","type":"timeline","content":"1948 – PUMA founded in Germany
1968 – Olympic gold moments elevate brand visibility
1998 – Motorsport expansion accelerates
2020+ – Global performance & lifestyle dominance"}]

title: The Art of Handcrafted Leather
excerpt: A journey into the meticulous craft of hand-stitched leather goods passed down through three generations of artisans.
content: [{"id":"section-1001","type":"text","content":"Every piece begins with the careful selection of full-grain leather, sourced from tanneries that have served master craftsmen for over a century."},{"id":"section-1002","type":"quote","content":"\"A bag crafted by hand carries the soul of its maker.\"","caption":"Maria Conti, Master Artisan"}]

title: Summer 2025 Collection Launch
excerpt: Discover the inspiration behind our most vibrant collection yet — a celebration of Mediterranean light and colour.
content:
[{"id":"section-2001","type":"text","content":"Inspired by the golden hour along the Amalfi Coast, our Summer 2025 collection blends flowing silhouettes with bold, sun-kissed hues."},{"id":"section-2002","type":"timeline","content":"January – Concept sketches finalized
March – Fabric sourcing complete
May – Final collection revealed
June – Global launch"}]
